About Me

Building Tomorrow's
Technology Today

I'm a B.Tech Information Technology student at MIT Academy of Engineering (MITAOE), Pune. My journey in tech started with a curiosity about how software shapes our everyday lives — and that curiosity has only grown stronger.

I have a keen interest in software development, cloud computing, and artificial intelligence. I enjoy building practical projects that solve real-world problems and constantly explore new frameworks, tools, and technologies to sharpen my skills.

When I'm not coding, I love learning about emerging trends in tech, contributing to collaborative projects, and challenging myself with data-driven problems.

Software Development Cloud Computing Artificial Intelligence Data Analysis Problem Solving Open Source
Core Values

What I Stand For

The principles that guide my work, learning, and every interaction I have.

Curiosity
I believe in constantly asking questions and exploring new ideas to grow as a developer and as a person.
Integrity
Honesty and transparency in every project and collaboration — doing the right thing even when no one is watching.
Collaboration
Great things are built together. I value teamwork, open communication, and learning from others.
Continuous Growth
Technology evolves fast — I am committed to lifelong learning and pushing beyond my comfort zone.
Personal Goals & History

My Journey & Aspirations

Where I come from, where I am, and where I am headed in my tech career.

My Story
From Curiosity to Code
Growing up in Pune, I was always fascinated by how technology shapes everyday life. My journey began with tinkering on computers, which led me to pursue B.Tech in Information Technology at MITAOE. Every project I build is a step forward in turning that early curiosity into real-world impact.
Short-Term Goals
Building Strong Foundations
Complete my B.Tech with distinction, secure a meaningful internship in software development or cloud computing, and contribute to at least one open-source project. I aim to deepen my expertise in Python, web technologies, and AI fundamentals.
Long-Term Vision
Becoming a Full-Stack Engineer
My long-term goal is to become a versatile full-stack engineer with expertise in cloud-native applications and AI-driven solutions. I aspire to work on products that solve meaningful problems at scale and eventually mentor the next generation of developers.
Academic Milestones
Key Achievements So Far
Completed HSC Science with strong scores in Mathematics and Physics. Currently enrolled in B.Tech IT at MITAOE, Pune. Built multiple projects spanning Python automation, web development, and data analysis — each one sharpening my problem-solving skills.
Accomplishments

Proud Achievements

Milestones, recognitions, and moments that mark my growth as a student and developer.

B.Tech Enrollment at MITAOE
Successfully secured admission to MIT Academy of Engineering, one of Pune's premier engineering institutions, to pursue B.Tech in Information Technology.
Academic
Duplicate File Finder Project
Independently designed and built a Python utility using MD5 hashing to detect and remove duplicate files — demonstrating practical problem-solving and file system knowledge.
Project
Medical Store Website
Delivered a fully functional, responsive front-end website for a real-world client using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — first experience building for an actual use case.
Real-World
Data Analysis with Python
Completed an end-to-end exploratory data analysis project using Pandas and Matplotlib, extracting meaningful insights from a real-world dataset.
Data Science
HSC Science — Maharashtra Board
Completed 12th grade with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics, building the analytical foundation that drives my engineering mindset today.
Academic
Active Collaborator & Team Player
Consistently recognized by peers and professors for strong collaboration skills, timely delivery, and creative contributions in group projects and workshops.

Featured Projects

Projects I've built to solve real problems and apply what I've learned in practice.

PythonFile SystemAutomation
Duplicate File Finder
A Python utility that scans directories to detect duplicate files using MD5 hashing — helping users reclaim disk space by identifying redundant files across complex folder structures.
